title: Get Business Centers
content:
Use this endpoint to obtain the list of Business Centers that a user has access to. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/get/| /v1.3/bc/get/| |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number|`bc_id`: string| |Response parameter name and data type|`id`: number |`bc_id`: string | |New response parameters|/|`verification_status`| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162). ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id |string|The Business Center ID. When not passed, returns the user's entire list of Business Centers by default, and returns the specified Business Center account when passed in. | |page |number|Current number of pages. Default value: 1. Value range : ≥ 1.| |page_size |number|Page size. Default value: 10. Value range: 1-50.| ``` ### Examples ``` xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/get/?page=1&page_size=50' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{45%}|Data Type{10%}|Description{45%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Return code, see [Appendix-Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097) | |message |string|Return message, see [Appendix-Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |data |object|Return data.| #|list |object[]| Business Center list. | ##|bc_info |object| Business Center. | ###|bc_id |string| Business Center ID. | ###|verification_status|string|Business verification status of the Business Center.

Enum values:
  • `NOT_SUBMITTED`: The business verification has not been submitted.
  • `REVIEWING`: The business verification is currently under review.
  • `VERIFIED`: The business has been verified successfully.
  • `FAILED`: The business verification has failed.
  • `EXPIRED`: The business verification has expired.
| ###|name |string| Business Center name. | ###|company |string| Business Center Company Name. | ###|currency |string| Business Center payment currency, the value range is shown in [Appendix-Currency](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737585839634433). | ###|registered_area |string| Business Center registration code, the value range is shown in [Appendix-Location code](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737585867307010). | ###|status |string| Business Center status. Enum values：`REVIEWING` (under review), `DENY` (rejected), `ENABLE` (passed), `PUNISH` (disabled), see [Enumeration-Business Center Status](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138). | ###|timezone |string| The time zone where the Business Center is located, the value range is shown in [Appendix-Time Zone](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737586324313089). | ###|type |string| Business Center type. Enum values:
  • `NORMAL`: Regular Business Center.
  • `DIRECT`: Non-self-serve Direct Business Center.
  • `AGENCY`: Non-self-serve Agency Business Center.
  • `SELF_SERVICE`: Self-serve Direct Business Center.
  • `SELF_SERVICE_AGENCY`: Self-serve Agency Business Center.
| ##|user_role |string| Business Center user type. Enum values: `ADMIN` (administrator), `STANDARD` (standard). | ##|ext_user_role|object|Advanced role of the user in the Business Center orther than basic role, this is optional.| ###|finance_role|string|User finance role. Enum values: `MANAGER` (Finance Manager), `ANALYST` (Finance Analyst).| #|page_info |object| Page information. | ##|page |number| Current page number. | ##|page_size |number| Paging Size. | ##|total_number |number| Total number of results. | ##|total_page |number| Total pages. | |request_id |string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ``` xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) { "code": 0, "message": "{{message}}", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "list": [ { "bc_info": { "bc_id": "{{bc_id}}", "company": "{{company}}", "currency": "SGD", "name": "{{name}}", "organization_type": "STANDARD", "registered_area": "SG", "status": "ENABLE", "timezone": "Asia/Jakarta", "type": "SELF_SERVICE", "verification_status": "NOT_SUBMITTED" }, "ext_user_role": { "finance_role": "MANAGER" }, "user_role": "ADMIN" } ], "page_info": { "page": 1, "page_size": 50, "total_number": 1, "total_page": 1 }, "parent_bc": { "bc_info": {} } } } (/code); ```
